message:
style(tests): Apply Clippy lints to PTY harness tests

- Replace manual ASCII range check with is_ascii_graphic()
- Use inline format args throughout (e.g., print!("[0x{b:02X}]"))
- Extract TERM_COLS to usize once instead of repeated casts
- Use enumerate() instead of manual line_num counter
- Add parentheses for correct operator precedence in filter
  (c != '\x1b' && c.is_ascii_graphic()) vs c != '\x1b' && c.is_ascii_graphic()

These lints catch real issues (the precedence fix) while also cleaning
up style. No behavioral changes to tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
